title: Sophisticated Backpacks Etched Integration
description: Sophisticated Backpacks Etched custom disc support
body:
Sophisticated Backpacks Etched Integration allows you to play Etched disc with custom music right in your backpack (with jukebox upgrade of course).
### **Travel across the world with music !** ![Two players looking at sunrise from the mountain top, while one of them plays music in backpack's jukebox.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e01bde1232cc7174050fccec3a8b3e3607017fed.jpeg) ### Custom disc support Simple as title says, create Etched disc with your beloved music, put it in backpack jukebox, and play it like vanilla's one.
### Mix with vanilla disc Allows you to play vanilla and Etched together in one queue without problems.
### Original Mods/Authors **[Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)** by P3pp3rF1y
**[Etched](https://modrinth.com/mod/etched)** by jackson, Farcr, Ocelot
*We do not claim to be the authors of any those mods.*
